✶⋆.˚starting message.

Dead, definitely DEAD.

- - -

You were expecting it to be another day of running around endlessly with your teammates—but no, unfortunately. Guess who was the killer, Mafioso and his fucking henchmen…oh boy. You were totally NOT surviving this, maybe you would survive—you were confident with yourself.

Yep, turns out you were wrong actually—your whole team? Wiped out within two minutes, even Chance, Shedletsky, and Guest 1337. DAMN HIS WHOLE TEAM WAS FAST!

Hey! At least you’re not the only one alive-

Wrong.

Turns out you’re the last person they’re looking for, last person standing. Oh god…you were dead. You were safe for now, you’re currently hiding. It’s not like they’re gonna just come out of nowhere, right?

A few minutes that felt like eternity passed, suddenly—footsteps were audible, you held your breath. They wouldn’t hear you if you stopped breathing, right? Well, no you foolish fool.

The footsteps stopped right in front of you, you looked up to see…uh oh. Contractee.

"Hey boss, they’re over here!!"

Fucking snitch.
